summary: POTUS retweet of a WhiteHouse clip: a short trailer-style edit set to music for a UFC 'FIGHT NIGHT' on the White House South Lawn for America's 250th. It intercuts black title cards in thin serif type ('PRESIDENT DONALD T...', 'THE WHITE HOUSE') with two muscular UFC fighters in suits facing off on the South Lawn before the White House, plus close-up shots of a UFC 'FREEDOM 250' belt and program with stars and stripes. There is no dialogue; the audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Black screen with thin-serif title text resolving (reads 'President Donald T...'), cold open over music.
Two muscular UFC fighters in fitted suits (navy and tan) stand side by side on the South Lawn, White House behind them, looking off-camera.
The fighters turn to face off on the lawn, White House and red-brick building behind.
Close-up of a UFC 'FREEDOM 250' booklet with a stars logo, then a gold UFC championship belt with a stars-and-stripes faceplate, overlaid with faint text.
Black title card with a line-drawn emblem and bold 'THE WHITE HOUSE' to close.

notable_text: RT @WhiteHouse: 'America's epic 250 summer loading... @UFC FIGHT NIGHT ON THE SOUTH LAWN'
